video_job.actor_prompt: Cinematic shot in a Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood interior with soft orange forge glow. Ari Ashbell, a masculine frontline adventurer in a reinforced leather guild cloak, is firmly holding a damaged shield flat on a workbench. Ari Emberlane, a feminine scout in a cropped travel jacket and messenger straps, carefully guides a small, non-sparking repair tool over the shield's surface. Cooperative teamwork, focused expressions, high-quality anime-inspired fantasy art style, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous cinematic shot of the guild forge. Ari Emberlane completes the repair by tapping a final harmless mark on the shield with her tool, while Ari Ashbell continues to hold the shield steady with a confident, reliable stance. Warm ambient lighting, clear fluid tool motion, friendly interaction, consistent character appearance, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The content depicts a professional, non-sexual, cooperative task between two fantasy characters. No dangerous items or sparks are present. No text or watermarks are included.

timeline_story.selection_reason: The guild forge is experiencing a massive gear backlog following the goblin raid, requiring coordinated effort to maintain combat readiness.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Shared labor in the forge strengthens professional trust and reliability.
Assisting the frontline ensures gear is ready for the next expedition.
